1	## summary
2	
3	调研 lens = 「成熟框架代码链路 clone 深扒」。结论:**没有任何高 star + 近活跃的 SwiftUI「车控/座舱 HMI」专用 repo 可直接 adopt**(Tesla-app 类全是 0★ 玩具,2021-2023 死掉)——10 族展示方案只能用「通用 dashboard 网格 + 成熟动画/shader 组件」拼装。但好消息:本机已 clone 的 ref-repos + 1 个新 clone(Inferno) + iOS 原生 API 足够覆盖全部需求,且 file:line 级可抄的代码模式都已坐实。
4	
5	**10 族展示的根本信息架构问题** = scheme1 只画 4-6 张同质卡片(2×2),撑不住 10 族 + 异构值形态(温度连续/风量档位/RGB/开度/座椅多维)。解法 = **全景自适应网格(10 族卡)→ 点击/语音聚焦 matchedGeometry 展开成详情面板(异构值控件)→ 背景 dim/blur**。这套「网格→聚焦展开」是 SwiftUI 业界最成熟的 hero 模式,本机 DaVinci(sliding pill) + IceCubes(grid→navigate) 已有半套,完整 expand-in-place 需用 SwiftUI Lab 范式补齐。
6	
7	核心代码模式全部坐实可抄:
8	- **自适应网格**: `ContentView.swift:40` 现已用 `.adaptive(minimum:160)`(✅已对);iPhone 用 `.flexible()`×2 固定列、Mac/投屏 `.adaptive(minimum:200)` 自适应列。
9	- **matchedGeometry 聚焦展开**: ZStack overlay + 同 `id`+`@Namespace` + `Color.clear` 占位 + `withAnimation(.spring)`(SwiftUI Lab);导航式则 `matchedTransitionSource`+`.navigationTransition(.zoom)`(iOS18 需 `#available`)。
10	- **异构值控件**: 连续值(温度/风量/开度)= 原生 `Gauge(.accessoryCircular)`+ gradient tint(iOS16,零依赖);档位 = DaVinci `DSSegmentedControl` 的 `matchedGeometryEffect(id:"selectedSegment")` 滑块;数字滚动 = ShipSwift `SWKPICard` 的 `.contentTransition(.numericText())`。
11	- **激活辉光/呼吸/水波**: scheme1 box-shadow breathe(已有)+ Orb `RotatingGlowView`(纯代码 Circle+blur mask,iOS17 fallback)+ Inferno `Water.metal`(炸场水波,对齐 U5 已锁决策)。

1	# Lens: 本地适配 / 硬约束 — 10 族车控在 Mac/iPhone 各能怎么排
2	
3	> 调研日期 2026-06-23 | 本机 scout 坐实 + 12 路 WebSearch + gh 热度核 | focus = **怎么展示 10 族（信息架构 + 物理排布约束）**，不调配色
4	
5	## summary
6	
7	本机实况是这个 lens 的**头号一手约束，且推翻了若干默认假设**：当前演示主屏 = **外接 Philips 272S9 @ 1920×1080 非 Retina（不是 MacBook Retina）**，M5/32GB/Metal 4 算力远超 10-30 张辉光卡所需（性能不是瓶颈，**1080p 物理像素 + 投屏 8bit banding 才是**）。10 族信息架构的根本约束不是"卡片画不下"，而是 **(a) 投屏暗底大渐变会 banding + 字小看不清**（claim-vs-reality 验收红线）、**(b) 191 device × 异构值形态塞进一屏会信息过载**、**(c) 辉光=offscreen render，10 张同屏 breathe 动画在滚动/动画下会叠加 GPU 成本**。结论框定：**Mac 横屏 = 10 族 5×2 或 4×3 自适应网格常驻（A 方案：全景常驻 + 触发聚焦）；iPhone 竖屏 = 2 列 × 滚动 + 当前活跃族置顶**。族级卡（U13 family_card_id，10 张）是对的粒度，191 device 绝不平铺。
8	
9	## findings（逐条带 source）
10	
11	### F1 🔴 本机主屏 = 1920×1080 非 Retina 外接屏（不是 MacBook Retina），这是演示真实查看环境
12	本机 scout：`system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType` → 唯一 Main Display = `PHL 272S9 / Resolution 1920×1080 (1080p FHD) / UI Looks like 1920×1080 @75Hz`，**无 Built-In Retina 出现在 attached display 列表**（MacBook 在外接屏模式）。含义：① 演示画布只有 **1920×1080 逻辑像素 @1x**（非 Retina @2x 的 3840×2160 等效）→ 字号/线宽/glow 半径要按 1x 物理像素设计，Retina 上"清晰"的细字在这块屏会糊；② 投影仪/会议室大屏多半也是 1080p → 双重 1x。
13	- source: 本机 `system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType`（2026-06-23 实跑）
14	
15	### F2 🔴 prototype 自己写明演示场景 = "iPhone 竖屏，投屏给会议室"，但 U1 拍 Mac 主——两者要分别排
16	`ui-concepts-3-schemes.html` 副标题原文：「iPhone 竖屏, 投屏给会议室。目标: 一眼碾压 AWS 那个扁平 Android 灰卡片」。U1（grill §3:115）拍 `primary_device=mac + iphone_role=bonus`。→ **两套布局都要出**：Mac 横屏（主舞台，可全景常驻）+ iPhone 竖屏（投屏/手持，必滚动）。
17	- source: `prototypes/ui-concepts-3-schemes.html`（副标题）+ `docs/grill-tournament/grill-decisions-master.md:115`（U1）
18	
19	### F3 🔴 投屏 8-bit 暗底大渐变 = banding 高危，深空辉光方向天然踩坑（验收红线）
20	8 bit = 256 阶/通道，**暗色调可用阶最少**，大面积暗渐变拉过宽屏 → 可见色阶台阶（posterization）；"在亮处看 OK 的暗渐变，在暗房投影 + 亮度调高会崩"；投影仪 dynamic contrast 等后处理放大 banding。修法：① 暗底**别铺满大面积低对比渐变**（与 U11 halation 约束同向：base 用 `#0a0b12` 非纯黑，cyan 散光占屏 30-60% 别铺满）② 加**极细 dither/noise** 打散色阶 ③ 关键说明用**高对比 + 大字**承载，不靠渐变细微差。**对应 aesthetic-first 验收纪律：必还原投屏实查环境，不看自己导出的高清图。**
21	- source: [willgibbons.com/color-banding](https://www.willgibbons.com/color-banding)（2025）+ [son-video.com 4K TVs projectors banding](https://blog.son-video.com/en/2021/03/4k-tvs-and-projectors-what-is-color-banding-posterization-or-solarization/) + tokens.md U11 halation 约束
22	
23	### F4 演示字号物理下限：1080p 投屏 body ≥24pt、标题 ≥44pt（8H 规则 / Extron 1英寸/15英尺）
24	通用最小 24pt body；大厅 28-34pt body + 44pt+ 标题；8H 规则 = 文字 ≥屏高 1/50；Extron videowall = 每 15 英尺观看距离文字高 ≥1 英寸（30 英尺→58pt）。**这些是 PPT pt，映射到 SwiftUI**：在 1080p @1x 上，族卡标题/数值要按"会议室后排可读"放大——现状 `font.card.val 15px`（scheme1）**远低于演示下限**，纯前端 mock 可以，真投屏 demo 必放大族卡数值到 ≥28-36pt 等效。
25	- source: [presentationguild.org 8H Rule](https://presentationguild.org/how-big-big-enough-the-8h-rule-reveals-all/) + [Extron videowall font size](https://www.extron.com/article/videowallfontsize) + tokens.md `font.card.val`
26	
27	### F5 iPhone 15 Pro 物理画布：393×852 pt，竖屏安全区可用高 759pt（顶 59 + 底 34 被吃）
28	iPhone 15 Pro = 393×852 pt @3x，竖屏安全区 top 59 / bottom 34 → 可用高 **759pt**。三屏分层（语音 orb 顶 / 对话流中 / 车控卡下）要在 759pt 里分配：orb+顶栏 ~120pt、对话流 ~200pt、mic ~80pt → 车控卡区只剩 **~360pt**。结论：**iPhone 竖屏一屏放不下 10 族**（10 族 2 列需 5 行，每行 ≥72pt = 360pt 刚好但无呼吸空间）→ 必**滚动 + 活跃族置顶 / 浮现**，不强求常驻全 10 族。
29	- source: [useyourloaf.com iPhone 15 screen sizes](https://useyourloaf.com/blog/iphone-15-screen-sizes/) + [yesviz iphone-15-pro](https://yesviz.com/devices/iphone-15-pro/)
30	
31	### F6 Mac 横屏自适应网格用 `.adaptive`，10 族 5×2 / 4×3 自动 reflow，是官方推荐
32	`GridItem(.adaptive(minimum:))` 让网格按窗口宽自动塞最多列，"macOS 用 .adaptive 支持窗口缩放 = 顶级原生体验"。10 族在 1920 宽横屏 = 5 列×2 行（每卡 ~340pt 宽，舒展）或窗口缩小自动降 4 列×3 行。**现状 ContentView 已用 `LazyVGrid(.adaptive(minimum:160))`** 但 minimum 160 太小 + 喂的是 22 个 device 平铺（不是 10 族）→ 改喂 10 族 family card + minimum 调到 ~300（Mac）/ ~170（iPhone）。
33	- source: [avanderlee.com grid-lazyvgrid](https://www.avanderlee.com/swiftui/grid-lazyvgrid-lazyhgrid-gridviews/)（"macOS use .adaptive whenever possible"）+ `App/ContentView.swift:40`
34	
35	### F7 10 族这种固定小集合：`Grid`（非 Lazy）反而更优，Lazy 是大列表才需要
36	官方/社区共识："Grid 用于静态行列、性能没问题时；性能成瓶颈才升 LazyVGrid"。**10 族 = 固定 10 张，不滚动（Mac 横屏）→ 用 iOS16+ `Grid` 静态容器更合适**（精确行列对齐 + 不需 lazy 的复杂度）；只有 iPhone 竖屏需滚动时才 `LazyVGrid` 包 `ScrollView`。注意 ScrollView 默认 `clipsToBounds=true` 会**裁掉卡片 glow 溢出** → 需 `.scrollClipDisabled()`（iOS17+），但会增渲染区。
37	- source: [appmakers.dev grids-in-swiftui](https://appmakers.dev/grids-in-swiftui/) + [fatbobman ScrollView clipping](https://fatbobman.com/en/snippet/preventing-scrollview-content-clipping-in-swiftui/)
38	
39	### F8 辉光 = shadow/blur = offscreen render 昂贵，10 张同屏 breathe 动画会叠加 GPU 成本
40	`.shadow/.blur/.opacity/.mask` 触发 offscreen render（第二渲染 pass）；"滚动列表里多个 shadow/blur 成本复合"；glow 本质=shadow/blur 同成本。10 张 `motion.breathe`（box-shadow 呼吸 3.4s infinite）同屏 = 10 个持续动画 offscreen pass。修法：① 静态 glow 给 explicit shadow path ② 用 `drawingGroup()`（Metal 合成）但它自身加一个 pass，仅在真瓶颈用 ③ **不是所有 10 卡都同时 breathe，只激活态卡呼吸**（normal 态静默，省 9/10 动画）。**M5 算力够，但仍要遵守"只激活卡动"省成本 + ReduceMotion/低电量双通道**（tiger）。
41	- source: [medium 24 SwiftUI Performance Tips 2025](https://medium.com/@ravisolankice12/24-swiftui-performance-tips-every-ios-developer-should-know-2025-edition-723340d9bd79) + [hackingwithswift drawingGroup](https://www.hackingwithswift.com/books/ios-swiftui/enabling-high-performance-metal-rendering-with-drawinggroup) + tokens.md `motion.breathe`
42	
43	### F9 M5/Metal 4 GPU 算力充裕，性能不是 10 族布局的约束
44	M5 GPU 比 M4 快 30%、比 M1 快 2.5×，Metal 4，base M5 Metal Geekbench 76727。**渲染 10-30 张 SwiftUI glow 卡 @1080p 对 M5 是零压力**——瓶颈在显示侧（1080p 物理像素 + 投屏 banding + 字号），不在算力侧。含义：**别因"性能"砍掉辉光/动效**，该砍的理由是 banding/可读性/ReduceMotion，不是 GPU。
45	- source: [apple.com M5 newsroom](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2025/10/apple-unleashes-m5-the-next-big-leap-in-ai-performance-for-apple-silicon/) + [notebookcheck M5 GPU](https://www.notebookcheck.net/Apple-M5-GPU-Benchmarks-and-Specs.1139076.0.html) + 本机 `system_profiler`（Apple M5 / 10 GPU cores / Metal 4）
46	
47	### F10 异构值形态（温度连续/档位/RGB色/开度/座椅多维）塞进族卡 = 信息密度物理约束
48	10 族下值形态异构：温度 18-32℃ 连续 / 风量 1-10 档 / RGB 氛围灯色 / 车窗 0-100% / 座椅 加热×通风×按摩 多维 / 香氛浓度。**族卡空间有限（Mac ~340pt 宽 / iPhone ~170pt 宽），放不下完整 slider+stepper+color picker**。修法：族卡只显**当前态摘要**（大数值 + 图标 + 状态），细控件（CompactSlider/Stepper/色板）在**触发聚焦/展开态**才出（A 方案核心）。座椅多维 = 卡内三个小图标点阵（加热🔥/通风/按摩各一状态点），不放三个 slider。
49	- source: [github buh/CompactSlider](https://github.com/buh/CompactSlider) + [createwithswift forms sliders steppers](https://www.createwithswift.com/mastering-forms-in-swiftui-sliders-and-steppers/) + DemoVehicleStateStore.swift（191 device 异构 key）
50	
51	### F11 车机标杆（Polestar 4）= 横屏 1920×1200 + 气候控制常驻底部 strip，验证"族级常驻 + 细控展开"
52	Polestar 4 中控 = 15.4" 横屏 1920×1200，主页直达 car/nav/media/call，**气候控制在永久底部 strip**，点 fan 图标才进细设置。这印证 A 方案：**高频族常驻（strip/网格）+ 细控件按需展开**。也佐证横屏 1920 宽是车机原生比例（本机 1080p 横屏接近）。反例：Polestar 4 把出风口方向做成拖箭头被批"开车时蠢"——**demo 别把所有细控塞进小卡逼用户拖**，语音驱动恰好绕开这个坑。
53	- source: [polestar.com/us/polestar-4/infotainment](https://www.polestar.com/us/polestar-4/infotainment/) + [topgear polestar 4 interior](https://www.topgear.com/car-reviews/polestar/4/interior)
54	
55	### F12 卡片浮现/聚焦动效用 matchedGeometryEffect + asymmetric transition，是语音驱动的最优范式
56	语音驱动 demo（方案经理说话→卡片响应，非手指浏览）→ 卡片**插入/聚焦/联动**动画是 wow 核心。`matchedGeometryEffect` 做族卡→展开态 hero 放大（SwiftUI 自动插值，无需手算 frame）；`.transition(.asymmetric(insertion:.scale.combined(with:.opacity), removal:.move(edge:.bottom)...))` 做卡片浮现/退场。**对应 B 方案（纯动态浮现）的技术底**：说"打开空调"→空调卡 scale+fade 浮现/置顶。多意图连两句→多卡 staggered 联动（delay 错峰）。
57	- source: [medium matchedGeometryEffect hero 2025](https://medium.com/@bhumibhuva18/animation-masterclass-matchedgeometryeffect-in-real-world-swiftui-apps-1c096356a95e) + [appcoda grid animation iOS26](https://www.appcoda.com/learnswiftui/swiftui-grid-animation.html)
58	
59	### F13 现状 prototype 只 4-6 卡 2×2，撑不住 10 族——但 ContentView 已有 `.adaptive` 骨架可直接扩
60	scheme1 = `grid2 {grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}` 固定 2 列、6 卡（空调/座椅/车窗/风量/氛围灯/音乐）；ui-concepts 三方案分别 2 列/2 列/3 列。`ContentView.swift:40` 已是 `LazyVGrid(.adaptive(minimum:160))` 但喂 22 个 device 平铺。**gap = 信息架构粒度错（平铺 device 而非 10 族），不是布局技术缺**。改：喂 10 族 family card + minimum 调 Mac~300/iPhone~170 + 横竖屏分支即解。
61	- source: `prototypes/scheme1-deep-space-interactive.html:41,113-120` + `App/ContentView.swift:39-45`
62	
63	## pre-mortem 三分类
64	
65	### 🐯 TIGER（明确威胁，带验证清单）
66	- **投屏 8bit banding 把深空暗底渲成色阶台阶**（F3）。验证：用真投影仪/会议室屏放暗渐变页，暗房 + 亮度调高看色阶；规避 = base `#0a0b12` 非纯黑 + 极细 dither + glow 占屏 30-60% 不铺满 + 关键说明高对比大字。
67	- **现状字号（族卡值 15px）投屏后排看不清**（F4）。验证：还原 1080p 投屏 + 11-12 英尺外看；族卡数值放大到 ≥28-36pt 等效，标题 ≥44pt 等效。
68	- **10 张 glow 卡全部 breathe 同屏 = 10 个 offscreen 动画 pass，低端/旧 iPhone 掉帧 + 发热**（F8）。验证：只激活态卡 breathe（normal 静默），ReduceMotion/低电量双通道（颜色/数值/图标承载态，动画只锦上添花）。
69	- **iPhone 竖屏 759pt 可用高塞不下三屏分层 + 10 族常驻**（F5）。验证：iPhone 车控卡区只 ~360pt → 必滚动 + 活跃族置顶，别强求 10 族常驻全显。
70	
71	### 🐅 PAPER_TIGER（看似威胁实际可控，给证据）
72	- **"M5 算力扛不住辉光 10 卡"= 伪威胁**（F9）：M5 比 M4 快 30%/Metal 4，10-30 卡 @1080p 零压力。瓶颈在显示侧不在算力。
73	- **"LazyVGrid 性能问题"对 10 族 = 伪威胁**（F7）：10 张固定卡用静态 `Grid` 更优，根本不需 lazy 的复杂度；Lazy 是 10000 图才需要。
74	- **CompactSlider 库 stale = 半弃坑**：实查 550★ 但 pushedAt 2025-11-22（~7 月没动，**FAILS <60 天新鲜度**）。但它逻辑简单（hue slider/stepper ~30 行可自写），demo 不依赖它 = 低风险；细控件优先**自写 SwiftUI 原生 Slider/Stepper**，不引 stale 库。
75	
76	### 🐘 ELEPHANT（没人提但该提）
77	- **191 device 绝不平铺，但"族卡点开后 191 怎么展开"无人定**：F10 说细控在展开态出，但某族（如车窗 4 门 × 开度 / 空调 4 区温度）展开后子项也可能 >6 → 展开态自己需二级网格 / 分区 tab。demo 取巧：现场只说 10 族常见子项，展开态只画该族 3-4 个高频子 device（不画全 191）。
78	- **横竖屏切换/窗口缩放时 10 族 reflow 会重排闪烁**：`.adaptive` 在 5 列↔4 列临界宽度抖动重排，matchedGeometryEffect 可平滑但要同 namespace。demo 锁定窗口尺寸（横屏满屏）规避临界抖动。
79	- **本机当前是外接 1080p 单屏，MacBook 内屏没在用**：若现场用 MacBook 内屏（Retina @2x）演示，像素密度翻倍，字号/glow 半径要随屏适配（@1x vs @2x 两套）——别只按一块屏调好就以为通用。
80	
81	## adopt 候选（族卡布局 + 异构值控件，带 file:line/URL）
82	- **ContentView.swift:39-45 现有 `.adaptive` LazyVGrid 骨架** — 直接改喂 10 族 family card + minimum 调 Mac300/iPhone170 + 横竖屏分支，零新依赖（本机，最优起点）。
83	- **iOS16+ 原生 `Grid` 容器** — Mac 横屏 10 族固定 5×2 静态网格，比 LazyVGrid 更省（[appmakers.dev grids](https://appmakers.dev/grids-in-swiftui/)）。
84	- **matchedGeometryEffect + asymmetric transition**（原生）— 族卡聚焦/浮现/多意图联动 hero 动画，无需手算 frame（[medium hero 2025](https://medium.com/@bhumibhuva18/animation-masterclass-matchedgeometryeffect-in-real-world-swiftui-apps-1c096356a95e)）。
85	- **自写原生 Slider/Stepper/色板**（不引 CompactSlider 550★ 但 stale ~7月）— 展开态细控件，~30 行，离线零依赖。
86	- **hanlin-ai（CherryHQ）230★ pushedAt 2026-05-31 ~23天 FRESH** — 已 clone 在 ref-repos，VoiceInputView/LoadingGradientText 可抄（UIUE 研究已认证），布局粒度可参考。
87	
88	## presentation_options（本 lens 对"10 族怎么展示"的具体方案）
89	见下方 presentation_options 字段。
90

content.text: Very thorough lens research. Now let me read lens2 (car-HMI) and lens3 (cross-domain) plus the README to fully ground the candidates, then move to web verification of the load-bearing facts (SwiftUI API versions, AVSpeechSynthesizer, Bonjour/Network framework, MeshGradient, etc).

content.content:
1	## summary
2	
3	调研 lens = **车机/座舱 HMI 多域控制展示范式**(主候选深扒)。结论:真实车机用**四种主流信息架构**展示多域控制——网格式(已淘汰)/卡片式(中国新势力主流,理想代表)/分区式(功能分区建位置记忆,安全导向)/地图为桌面(特斯拉/蔚来/小鹏,功能浮现卡片)。MAformac scheme1 现 6 卡片 2×2 静态网格 = 退化的「网格式」,撑不住 10 族 + 异构值形态。
4	
5	对 MAformac 最 actionable 的范式:
6	1. **分区式 + 卡片式混合**(行业最优实践)——分区建稳定空间布局(舒适/车身/娱乐),卡片承载高频功能 + 快捷操作 + 动态信息。
7	2. **「Zero Layer / 零层级」**(奔驰 MBUX)——重要功能常驻顶层不进子菜单,AI 按场景再浮现 20 个补充卡片。**直接对应 MAformac「语音驱动 + 卡片浮现」的 demo 形态**。
8	3. **异构值形态 → 异构 widget**(温度=slider/拖拽手势,风量档位=stepper I/II/III,座椅加热=分级 toggle,开关=toggle,RGB=色环/色卡)——解决 MAformac value.type 三分(SPOT/EXP/PERCENT)的展示。
9	4. **多模态语音反馈三态**(listening/processing/confirming)+ **dual-modality「说+显」**——68% 用户语音后不确定是否被听懂,卡片浮现 = 视觉确认。**这是 MAformac 演示「炸场」的核心机制**。
10	5. **drive vs park 双态布局** + **多屏联动**(理想:温度变化 surface 到主驾屏)——对应 MAformac 双屏(Mac 主舞台 + iPhone)。
11	6. **NOMI 是反例**:NIO 故意不用抽象 orb,用拟人化「脸」。MAformac 选 orb 是另一条审美路线(科幻而非萌宠),需自觉这是取舍而非默认。
12	
13	## findings(逐条带 source)
14	
15	### F1. 四种主流车机信息架构(MAformac 选型的根本参照)
16	《智能座舱 HMI 设计》梳理 4 类系统级 IA:
17	- **网格式**:应用图标平铺、优先级相同,用户自选。代表 = 苹果 CarPlay。**因高频/低频应用使用差异大,已比较少见(淘汰)**。→ scheme1 的 2×2 网格正是这一退化型。
18	- **卡片式**:延用移动端 App 思路,首屏同时展示 3-4 应用 + 快捷操作。**接触面积大、降低误触、可承载动态信息**。**国内新势力主流,理想代表**。
19	- **分区式**:界面分导航区/娱乐区/车辆信息区,**各区明确定位、互不干扰,建立信息位置记忆**,减少搜索分心保障安全。
20	- **地图为桌面**:导航最底层,其他功能以快捷卡片浮现首页固定位。代表 = 特斯拉全系/蔚来 NIO OS/小鹏 Xmart OS。
21	- **🔴 实践最优 = 混合架构**:以分区建稳定空间布局,以卡片承载高频功能与快捷操作,再以可自定义一级入口满足个性化。
22	- source: https://siyujia.net/posts/hmidesign (《万字长文》智能座舱 HMI 设计) + https://www.uisdc.com/lixiang-hmi-design (优设网理想再设计) | 2026-06-23 检索
23	
24	### F2. 理想「L 型」布局 + Dock 栏分区(卡片+分区混合的最佳实证)
25	理想 L 系列首页四大板块:左上 1/3 固定车辆状态(SR 渲染+多媒体)/ 左下 Dock 栏 = 主页/设置/导航/车控/APP/360 高优先入口 / 右上 2/3 = **快捷卡片(横向滑动切换其它卡片)** / 右下 Dock 栏 = **空调 + 尾门/充电口盖/门锁等高频功能**。空调界面「简单直接」:温度/风量/风向/净化/除雾全用滑动条或虚拟按键排左侧,右侧集成全车座椅通风/加热,**功能键面积普遍很大**。首页 Dock 栏空调可不进全屏弹卡直接快速调温。**多屏联动**:2.0 版滑动调温时温度变化直接出现在主驾信息屏(原需低头看空调屏)。
26	- 评测者指出卡片「信息利用率偏低」,建议加 mini 卡片轮播展示里程/胎压/水温/车内温度等。
27	- source: https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/170606625 + https://www.xchuxing.com/article/71334 (呆总聊车机理想座舱再设计) | 2026-06-23 检索
28	
29	### F3. 奔驰 MBUX「Zero Layer 零层级」+ AI 浮现 20 卡片(MAformac 语音浮现范式直接参照)
30	MBUX Hyperscreen(56 寸单片玻璃三屏):**「零层级」= 用户不需滚子菜单或语音命令,最重要应用始终在顶层按情境/上下文呈现**。导航/通话/媒体/空调常驻可见,地图始终作背景。**AI 在合适时机额外浮现 20 个功能卡片**——如学习驾驶员座椅加热/按摩习惯,在常激活时段主动建议。无物理按键(12 个 actuator 提供触觉反馈),OLED 非控像素关闭呈深黑。支持 7 套 profile 分区(乘客可见但不可覆盖驾驶员选择)。
31	- source: https://group.mercedes-benz.com/innovation/digitalisation/connectivity/mbux-hyperscreen.html + https://www.mbusa.com/en/future-vehicles/mbux-hyperscreen | 2026-06-23 检索
32	
33	### F4. 特斯拉底部栏快捷控制 + 气候卡片(slider/stepper/toggle 混合 widget 实证)
34	气候控制常驻中控屏底部,默认 Auto。点温度值进主气候屏;Model 3 可三连点气候区调出菜单。**「My Apps」底部栏可自定义**:长按进编辑、从 app tray 拖入快捷;**座椅加热/雨刮除霜/方向盘加热可直接拖到底部栏**(座椅加热特殊,显示在温度旁)。气候卡片含:电源 toggle、座椅加热(3→1 三级,加热红/制冷蓝扭线 icon)、除霜 toggle(30 分自动关)、方向盘加热、出风方向。**Split 分驾乘双温区**时底部栏动态变化。**拖拽手势**:按住温度值左拖减/右拖增(替代弹出 slider);**按住风扇 icon 关 HVAC**。
35	- source: https://www.tesla.com/ownersmanual/model3/en_gb/GUID-518C51C1...html (官方手册) + https://www.shop4tesla.com/en/pages/tesla-klimaregelung-anleitung-model-y-model-3 | 2026-06-23 检索
36	
37	### F5. 异构值形态 → 异构控制 widget 映射(MAformac value.type 三分的展示答案)
38	HMI widget-to-function 标准映射:
39	- **温度(连续值)** → slider 或 stepper(常叠加拖拽手势)
40	- **风量/通风档位(离散)** → 离散 stepper(I/II/III/auto/off)
41	- **座椅加热(分级)** → 分级 stepper/toggle(off→high)
42	- **HVAC 开关(二元)** → toggle(常用 press-and-hold 风扇 icon 省空间)
43	- driver distraction 是核心约束 → 拖拽手势降低相比小 slider 的精度要求。
44	- → **直接对应 MAformac**:温度 18-32℃=slider+offset 动效 / 风量 1-10 档=stepper / 座椅多维(加热×通风×按摩)=分组分级 / 开关=toggle / RGB 氛围灯=色环或预设色卡。
45	- source: https://axureboutique.com/blogs/ui-ux-design/detailed-explanation-of-automotive-hmi-interaction-design-part-2 + Tesla 官方手册(F4) | 2026-06-23 检索
46	
47	### F6. 语音命令视觉反馈三态 + dual-modality「说+显」(MAformac 炸场核心机制)
48	- **68% 用户语音命令后因缺反馈而不确定**(Forrester 引);有效车机 VUI = 语音+视觉(HUD/触屏/仪表)+触觉+音效多模态协同。
49	- **「说+显」最佳实践**:识别命令后**视觉强化** —— 说「Call Mom」时屏显「Calling Mom」+ 语音确认,dual-modality 增强信心。
50	- **歧义用视觉卡片消解**:「Navigate to Home」多个 Home 地址列卡片供选。

88	## pre-mortem(tiger / paper-tiger / elephant)
89	
90	### tigers(明确威胁,带验证清单)
91	- **T1 — 10 族 × 异构值形态用单一卡片样式会信息过载/无法表达**:温度(连续)、档位(离散)、RGB(颜色)、多维座椅(加热×通风×按摩)无法塞进同一个「亮/暗」卡片。验证:列出 10 族每族的 value.type,确认每类有对应 widget(slider/stepper/色环/分组),scheme1 现 7 态二值压绿/灰**已被证实不够**(DemoVisualState 7 态枚举撑不住连续值)。
92	- **T2 — 纯动态浮现(候选 B)冷启动空屏不惊艳**:语音驱动若主屏初始空白,客户进场第一眼无「科幻感」。验证:对照 MBUX「Zero Layer 常驻 + AI 浮现」=常驻骨架 + 浮现叠加,而非纯空屏;需设计 idle 态全景常驻(A+B 混合)。
93	- **T3 — 多意图连续两句 → 多卡片同时浮现的视觉混乱**:「放首歌、空调调低」两卡片同时 pop 可能抢戏/时序乱。验证:参照「micro-animation scrolling cards 高亮 previous action」,做**错峰浮现**(150-300ms 间隔)+ 视线引导,而非同帧弹出。
94	
95	### paper-tigers(看似威胁实际安全,给证据)
96	- **P1 — 「真车机用 Android Automotive/Qt,SwiftUI 不专业」**:证据 = native SwiftUI 确实不用于量产车机,但 MAformac 是**端侧 demo 非量产**,SwiftUI 取巧合理;dash_pilot 等 SwiftUI 智能仪表 demo 存在。展示效果取决于设计而非框架。**不是威胁**。
97	- **P2 — 「现场只说 10 族,展示要全 191 device」**:证据 = U13 已拍卡片按 10 族 family_card_id(族级非 191 device 级),MBUX 也是常驻少数 + AI 浮现 20 个,**无车机一次平铺上百控件**。族级卡片 + 下钻是行业共识,**不是威胁**。
98	- **P3 — 「分区式更安全所以 MAformac 必须分区」**:证据 = 分区式的「位置记忆/降分心」价值是给**驾驶中真车**的(NHTSA 2 秒/12 秒);MAformac 是**销售演示非驾驶**,方案经理主动说话触发,安全约束不适用。分区可借其「视觉秩序」但不必为安全照搬。
99	
100	### elephants(没人提但该提)
101	- **E1 — 🔴 投屏到客户大屏的暗底渐变 banding(深空辉光暗底的致命隐患)**:MAformac 视觉语言锁定深空暗底(#0a0b12)+ 辉光渐变,但**暗色渐变在投影仪/大屏 8-bit + HDMI 上极易 banding**(人眼对暗部色阶最敏感,Weber-Fechner;高对比投影放大 100x)。HDMI 2.0 静默降 8-bit、16-235→0-255 range 失配都会产生条带。**修法 = UI 内置 per-pixel 细噪声 dithering(最有效)+ 确保 Full RGB range + 优先 HDMI 2.1/DP**。这是与「全局 aesthetic-first-principles 5 Gate + 飞书白皮书暗底丑教训」**同源的展示层炸雷**——验收必还原客户实际投屏环境,不看自己 Mac 屏。source: https://forums.blurbusters.com/viewtopic.php?t=927 + https://us.ktcplay.com/blogs/technology-hub/monitor-bit-depth-causes-banding
102	- **E2 — 多屏联动是真车机高赞功能但 MAformac 双屏(Mac+iPhone)未规划联动**:理想「滑动调温→主驾屏同步」被赞;MAformac iPhone「加分屏」若只是镜像而无联动(如 Mac 浮现卡片时 iPhone 同步高亮/补充信息),浪费双屏炸场机会。该把双屏当**协同舞台**(Mac 主控车控卡片,iPhone 显对话流/orb 特写)设计。
103	- **E3 — 语音 orb 的「三态」未必映射到 demo 真实链路状态**:F6 指 listening/processing/confirming 三态是信任关键,但 MAformac 端侧链路有 ASR→意图→ToolCall→DemoGuard→mock state 多段(C3 五段 trace),orb 若只两态(脉冲/静止)无法表达「正在思考/已确认」。该把 orb 状态机对齐链路阶段(聆听=ASR / 思考=LLM 推理 / 确认=卡片浮现),demo「反应快」的体感正来自三态清晰过渡。
104

1	## summary
2	
3	横向扫了 9 个多域控制展示范式(Apple Home / HA Lovelace+Mushroom / iOS18 Control Center / Mi Home / Echo Show / Google Hub Mode / NIO NOMI 车机 / 10-foot TV UI / EV infotainment),回答 MAformac 核心问题:**10 族车控怎么在前端展示**(scheme1 只 4 卡 2×2 撑不住)。最强可迁移结论:① 信息架构用 **bento 不对称网格**(尺寸=优先级,cap 8-12 tile)而非 scheme1 的均等 2×2;② 10 族对应 **family-level 卡片**(已 U13 拍),族内异构 device 用 **Apple Home / Mi Home 的「分组卡 → tap 展开」二级模型**,不是 191 device 全摊平;③ demo 是**语音驱动非手指浏览** → 核心机制是 **spotlight/scrim 聚焦**(被操作族高亮+放大,其余 dim/blur),这正是 10-foot TV UI 的 focus state + HA card-mod 的 state-dependent pulse/glow 的合流;④ 投屏到客户大屏 = **10-foot UI 约束**(本机实测主屏 1080p,字号 ≥24-28px,safe zone 内缩 5%,对比 ≥7:1,而非 web 4.5:1);⑤ 车机一手参照 = **NIO NOMI**(orb 助手 + 按座位定向注意力 + 语音改温度同步屏上视觉响应),与 MAformac「语音 orb 顶 / 对话流中 / 车控卡下」三屏天然同构。
4	
5	主候选信息架构 = **B' = 全景常驻 bento 网格(10 族 family-card)+ 语音触发 spotlight 聚焦被操作族**(候选 A 与 B 的合体),vs scheme1 静态 4 卡 = better(撑得住 10 族 + 语音驱动天然适配 + 投屏炸场)。

9	### 1. Apple Home — 分组卡 + 二级展开 + 两区 tile + section 重排(直接迁移:族内 device 折叠)

11	- **两功能区 tile**:左侧 icon = 快速开关,右侧 name = 进详细控制。→ 族卡可借:左半快开关/右半进调参。
12	- **section 可重排 + tile 可 resize**(单格/双格/四格)→ bento 不对称的官方背书。
13	- **category 视图**(Lights/Climate/Security 按房间网格)→ 类比「按族归类」。

49	- ⚠️ [待核] 未搜到 2026「Ambient mode 重命名 / Gemini 全面接管 Hub」,官方仍是「unlocked=Gemini / docked=Assistant」。
50	- source: https://support.google.com/googlepixeltablet/answer/13560613 (2026-06 检索)。
51	- vs scheme1: **unknown**(形态层参照,非卡片布局直接迁移)。
52	
53	### 7. 🔴 NIO NOMI — 车机一手参照:orb 助手 + 按座位定向注意力 + 语音控温同步屏上视觉(MAformac 同构度最高)
54	- **embodied orb**(2.18" AMOLED 480×480 圆屏动画脸 / 或 Halo 24 LED 环)= MAformac 顶部语音 orb 的车机原型;「NOMI = 车的化身,对它说话=对车说话」。
55	- **interior sensing 定向注意力**:转向说话的人(主驾/副驾/后排),anticipate 有人要说话时点亮暗屏 → **直接映射 demo「被操作族 spotlight 聚焦」**:语音触发 → 系统知道操作哪族 → 该族高亮+orb 朝向。
56	- 「语音调温度」同步屏上视觉响应 + ambient 灯 pulse(来电/警告) = **staged/simultaneous 多模反馈**(语音确认 + 卡片状态变 + 灯效)。
57	- 2026 SAIC-VW 旗舰抄 NOMI → 该范式被验证为车机主流。
58	- source: https://star.global/cases/nio-nomi/ + https://www.nio.com/blog/our-future-smart-cars-will-be-embodied-digital-assistants + https://eletric-vehicles.com/.../volkswagen-copies-nios-dashboard-assistant... (2026)。
59	- vs scheme1: **better** — scheme1 有 orb 但无「按操作族定向聚焦」机制,NOMI 给了车机级一手范式。
60	
61	### 8. Spotlight / Scrim 焦点范式 — 「语音驱动非手指浏览」的核心机制(demo 灵魂)
62	- **spotlight effect**:dim 背景 + 高亮关键元素,引导注意力,降认知负荷,「一次只聚焦一个」。
63	- **scrim**(半透明 dim 层,源自摄影遮光)+ **pulsating animation**(节律缩放抓眼不打扰)。
64	- → **demo 信息架构的关键洞察**:用户不浏览(方案经理说话触发),所以**默认全景常驻 + 语音点名族瞬间 spotlight(放大/高亮/orb 朝向)+ 其余 dim/blur** = 候选 A(全景)与 B(浮现)的最优合体 B'。这把「5min 视觉冲击 > 功能完整」落到具体机制。
65	- source: https://www.chameleon.io/blog/new-design-patterns-highlighting-elements + https://www.arrivaldesignsystem.com/article/scrims-and-overlays (2026-06 检索)。
66	- vs scheme1: **better** — scheme1 7 态压绿/灰二值,无聚焦机制,语音控时客户不知道「哪族在变」。
67	
68	### 9. Bento Grid 2026 标准 — 尺寸=优先级 + cap 8-12 tile + CSS Grid(10 族信息架构骨架)
69	- **不对称 tile**(hero 6 列 + 周边 2×2)= 「尺寸=空间权重 = 优先级,无需额外标签」。
70	- **🔴 cap 8-12 tile,>12-15 视觉过载** → **10 族正好在甜区**(不必分页),但每族内 device 必须折叠(否则 191 个就爆)。
71	- **均等尺寸 = 退化成「圆角传统网格」**(=scheme1 病) → 必须引入尺寸差。
72	- 响应式优雅塌缩:桌面 3-4 列 / 平板 2 列 / 手机 1 列,**手机按重要性重排非桌面位置**。
73	- 统一 gutter 12-24px;CSS Grid 非 Flexbox(SwiftUI 对应 LazyVGrid + GridItem)。
74	- source: https://www.orbix.studio/blogs/bento-grid-dashboard-design-aesthetics + https://www.saasframe.io/blog/designing-bento-grids-that-actually-work-a-2026-practical-guide (2026)。
75	- vs scheme1: **better** — 直接诊断 scheme1「均等 2×2 = 退化网格」并给修法。
76	
77	### 10. 异构 value 形态的控件范式(族内 device 怎么显示被控值)
78	- **连续值(温度 18-32℃)**:gradient slider(蓝→红色温映射)或 arc/dial;label 在 slider 上方(防手指遮挡)。
79	- **离散档位(风量 1-10 / 座椅 0-3)**:segmented control 优于 slider(「固定选项应一次全显」);或 discrete slider。
80	- **RGB 氛围灯**:color picker(spectrum/channel slider/HEX-RGB),触摸 swipe 四向。
81	- **百分比(车窗 0-100% / 天窗)**:连续 slider 或环形 gauge。
82	- **开关**:toggle。
83	- → **直接落 U13「value.type 三分动效」**:连续=gradient slider 滑动动效 / 离散=segment 跳变 / RGB=色环。
84	- source: https://www.shadcn.io/patterns/slider-settings-3 + https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/slider/ + https://www.nngroup.com (slider guidance) (2026-06 检索)。
85	- vs scheme1: **better** — scheme1 只画卡片不区分值形态,异构值显示是缺口。
86	
87	### 11. 10-foot TV UI — 投屏到客户大屏的硬约束(本机实测主屏 1080p)
88	- **focus state = TV 设计灵魂**:「glance-away 测试」(瞟开再看回,立刻知道选中谁)→ 投屏时被操作族高亮必须从远处可辨(粗边框/放大/对比线,暗底光晕不够,需对比线)。
89	- **字号 ≥24-28px @1080p**(web 16-18px ×2.5-3),safe zone 内缩 5%(96×54px),对比 **≥7:1**(高于 web 4.5:1)。
90	- **低信息密度 + 大留白**(billboard 非 app 思维)→ 反过来支持「10 族 family-card 不摊 191 device」。
91	- 本机 scout 实测:主屏 1920×1080 FHD → 设计稿必须在 1080p 验证(投屏 banding 风险见 pre-mortem)。
92	- source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/10-foot_user_interface + https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2025/09/designing-tv-principles-patterns-practical-guidance/ + 本机 system_profiler。
93	- vs scheme1: **unknown→better** — scheme1 未声明投屏约束,TV UI 给了量化门(字号/对比/safe zone)。
94	
95	### 12. EV infotainment 2026 — 常驻 climate 边栏 + drive/park 上下文布局(车控特定)
96	- **持久 stickied 控制**:Volvo 底部固定 climate+seat / GM 左侧固定 → 车控卡可常驻边/底。
97	- **drive vs park 双布局**:park=tablet 应用态 / drive=放大触控+大字+子集 → demo 可借「演示态」vs「待机态」。
98	- CarPlay iOS26 / Android Auto 2026 终于加 home widget grid → 车机走向「可定制卡片网格」。
99	- ⚠️ Euro NCAP 2026 罚「核心功能纯触屏」→ demo 是 mock 演示不涉真车安全,此约束**不适用**(paper-tiger)。
100	- source: https://www.theturnsignalblog.com/how-we-designed-a-white-label-in-car-infotainment-system/ + https://www.snappautomotive.io/blog/... + https://mergescreens.com/blogs/news/ios-26-carplay (2026)。
101	- vs scheme1: **better** — 常驻控制 + 上下文布局是车控特化补充。
102	
103	## pre-mortem
104	
105	### tigers(明确威胁,带验证清单)
106	- **T1 — 10 族 family-card 仍可能信息过载**:bento cap 8-12,10 族在甜区但若每族卡又塞太多子状态会爆。验证:逐族列「主状态(1 个)+ 可展开 device 数」,主视图每卡只显 1 主状态(at-a-glance),detail 进展开层。HA「show only if on」+ Apple 分组展开是解。
107	- **T2 — 语音驱动下「全景常驻」与「只显被控族」冲突未决**:候选 A(全 10 族常驻,客户看到能力全貌)vs B(只浮现被控,聚焦但客户不知有 10 族)。验证:做 A/B 真机对照,默认推 **B' = 常驻全景 + spotlight 聚焦被控**(两者优点合并),但需确认 spotlight 时其余 dim 程度(全黑会丢「能力全貌」,半透明保留)。**口径型分歧 → 建议上抛磊哥拍 A/B/B'**。
108	- **T3 — 投屏 1080p + 8bit 投影 banding**:深空辉光暗底渐变在 8bit 投影易 banding(色阶断层)。验证:导出深空背景到 1080p 8bit 测 banding,加 dithering 或减渐变跨度;字号/对比按 TV UI 门(≥28px/≥7:1)实测投屏可读(不是看自己高清导出图,要还原客户投影实查 — 见全局 aesthetic 验收纪律)。
109	- **T4 — 191 device 异构 value 形态前端组件不全**:温度 slider/档位 segment/RGB picker/百分比 gauge 至少 4 类组件,scheme1 只有卡片。验证:逐 value.type(SPOT/EXP/PERCENT + 连续/离散/RGB)列对应 SwiftUI 组件,确认 10 族覆盖,缺的补。
110	
111	### paper-tigers(看似威胁实际安全,给证据)
112	- **PT1 — Euro NCAP 2026 罚纯触屏**:仅约束**真车量产**核心功能(转向灯/雨刮/危险灯需物理键)。MAformac 是 mock 演示助手、不上真车、不涉行车安全 → **不适用**(CLAUDE §1 北极星 = 演示非量产)。证据:NCAP 针对 production vehicle safety rating。
113	- **PT2 — 「找不到原生 SwiftUI 智能家居 dashboard UI kit」**:搜确认无单一现成 kit(muhittincamdali/SwiftUI-Components 仅 21★ / larsoss 未找到 / sanjaynela 3★),但**不阻塞** — bento/spotlight/focus 是范式不是库,SwiftUI LazyVGrid+GridItem+matchedGeometryEffect+.ultraThinMaterial 原生即可实现,无需 adopt 外部 kit(且零依赖离线是硬约束,外部 kit 反而是负担)。证据:gh 实核星数低 + 视觉语言已锁深空辉光自绘。
114	- **PT3 — D-pad 焦点引擎(TV UI 重点)对 demo 不适用**:10-foot focus state 源于遥控器 D-pad 导航,demo 是语音+触摸非遥控器 → 焦点「导航」机制不迁移,但焦点「**视觉聚焦**(高亮/放大/对比线)」迁移(glance-away 测试对投屏仍成立)。证据:demo 输入是语音非 D-pad。
115	
116	### elephants(没人提但该提)
117	- **E1 — 多意图连续两句 = 多卡同时 spotlight 的编排未定**:U13/候选只谈单族聚焦,但「打开空调并降到22度 + 座椅加热」= 2 族同时被控。需定:同时高亮 2 卡?还是顺序 staged 聚焦(先空调亮、再座椅亮)?NOMI staged feedback + HA 多卡联动是参照,但 demo 编排顺序/时序是新设计点,直接影响「炸场」节奏。
118	- **E2 — orb / 对话流 / 车控卡三屏之间的视觉连续性(matchedGeometry)没人提**:NOMI 的「定向注意力」暗示 orb 应「指向」被操作族(空间连线)。三屏若割裂,语音→聚焦的因果链客户看不出;若用 SwiftUI matchedGeometryEffect 让 orb 发出的光「流向」被控族卡,因果可视化 = 真炸场点。这是 scheme1 三屏分层但无「跨屏连续动效」的缺口。
119	- **E3 — 「现场只说 10 族 + 族外 unsupported 兜底」的 UI 呈现没人设计**:范式翻案定了族外走 unsupported 兜底,但**前端怎么呈现 unsupported**(灰显?摇头动画?「该功能演示版未开放」卡片?)无定义。客户若手贱说族外,兜底 UI 的体面程度直接决定不丢脸。NOMI 「listening 但无对应动作」的 graceful 反馈可参照。
120	- **E4 — 香氛/灯光氛围这类「无明显物理状态」族的可视化难**:温度/车窗有直观度数/开度,但「香氛浓度 3 档」「氛围灯呼吸模式」在卡片上怎么显示「正在工作」?需粒子/呼吸光等抽象动效(Orb repo / SwiftUIShaders 已 clone 在 ref-repos 可用),否则这些族的卡片「死气沉沉」拖累炸场。
121	
122	## adopt 候选
123	
124	- **piitaya/lovelace-mushroom**(5033★ / pushed 2026-06-12 活)— **adopt 设计形态非代码**:卡片信息层级(icon+name+state 三段)、light/climate/cover 卡的「主控+次状态」拆分、按 family 归类。SwiftUI 重画,不引 JS(零依赖硬约束)。落点:族卡片视觉规格。
125	- **thomasloven/lovelace-layout-card**(1244★ / 2026-05-09 活)— **adopt 响应式网格思路**:masonry/grid 多布局 + 断点列数。对应 SwiftUI LazyVGrid adaptive GridItem。落点:Mac/iPhone/投屏 三尺寸响应式。
126	- **NIO NOMI 设计案例**(star.global case study)— **adopt 车机交互范式**:orb embodied + 按操作对象定向注意力 + 语音控同步视觉响应。落点:orb↔被控族 spatial 连线 + spotlight 聚焦机制。source: https://star.global/cases/nio-nomi/
127	- **HA card-mod state-dependent pulse/glow 模式** — **adopt 动效模式**:state→CSS 条件动画。对应 SwiftUI .animation(value: state) + 条件 .shadow/.scaleEffect。落点:value.type 三分动效 + 被操作高亮。source: https://www.smarthomejunkie.net/animated-icons-and-cards-for-home-assistant-easy-step-by-step/
128	- **本机已 clone ref-repos**:Orb(orb 动画)/ SwiftUIShaders(辉光/呼吸光)/ open-swiftui-animations / DSWaveformImage(语音波形)— **adopt 现成 SwiftUI 动效实现**,解 E4 抽象族可视化 + orb。落点:/Users/wanglei/workspace/raw/05-Projects/MAformac/ref-repos/{Orb,SwiftUIShaders,open-swiftui-animations}
129	- **shadcn/W3C ARIA value 控件范式** — **adapt 控件选型**:gradient slider(温度)/ segmented(档位)/ color picker(RGB)/ gauge(百分比)。落点:族内 device 异构 value 组件。source: https://www.shadcn.io/patterns/slider-settings-3

1	# MAformac 10 族车控前端【展示/呈现】综合官报告
2	
3	> 综合官收敛 7 lens（local-hardware / car-hmi / cross-domain / swift-components(空) / code-clone / pitfalls / recipe-boundary(空)）。focus = **10 族怎么在前端展示/呈现**（信息架构 + 形态 + 值可视化 + 双屏），非配色（配色已锁 tokens.md）。
4	> 一手核验：所有 star/pushedAt + ContentView/tokens file:line 已主线程 gh + Read 亲核（见 external_claims_to_verify 全 ✅）。
5	> 日期 2026-06-23。落点 `docs/design/`（视觉 SSOT）+ 喂回 grill master §3（U13/U26/U14 续批）。
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 1. 鸟瞰：7 路收敛出的唯一共识
10	
11	**5 路有效 lens（local-hardware / car-hmi / cross-domain / code-clone / pitfalls）独立收敛到同一个主视图形态**——不是 A/B/C 三选一，而是 **A+B 合体 = 全景常驻骨架 + 语音触发聚焦**（业界称谓不同但同构）：
12	
13	| lens | 给它的名字 | 核心机制 |
14	|---|---|---|
15	| local-hardware | A 全景常驻 + 触发聚焦 | Grid 5×2 常驻 + matchedGeometry hero 放大 |
16	| car-hmi | MBUX「Zero Layer」+ AI 浮现 | 常驻骨架 + 语音点名族高亮浮现 |
17	| cross-domain | **B' = 全景 bento + spotlight 聚焦** | 常驻全 10 族 + scrim dim 其余 + 聚焦被控 |
18	| code-clone | A「全景常驻 + 触发聚焦」 | ZStack overlay + @Namespace + Color.clear 占位 |
19	| pitfalls | A，但**聚焦过渡禁用 matchedGeometry** | 全景常驻消 reflow + opacity/scale 聚焦 |
20	
21	**5 路一致否决 B 纯动态浮现作主形态**（冷启动空屏不惊艳 + reflow 跳 + 懒渲染源不存在 + Reduce Motion 剥离瞬切，pitfalls 实证坑密度最高）；**5 路一致否决 C 静态全网格**（=scheme1 现状退化网格，10 族同时喊话抢走语音反馈注意力，违 Miller 7±2）。
22	
23	**唯一真分歧（口径型，必上抛磊哥）= 聚焦过渡用不用 matchedGeometryEffect**：code-clone 主张用（hero 动画最炫）vs pitfalls 主张禁用（LazyVGrid multiple-source 运行时冲突 + macOS `navigationTransition(.zoom)` unavailable 无退路 + Reduce Motion 不自动 fallback）。这是事实型可坐实——见 grill 弹药 G2。
24	
25	---
26	
27	## 2. 对比矩阵（见 comparison_matrix 字段）
28	
29	---
30	
31	## 3. steelman 守 scheme1：保留什么 / 为 10 族重构什么
32	
33	**三路认证保留（视觉语言层，已锁 tokens.md，不动）**：
34	- ✅ **三屏分层**（语音 orb 顶 / 对话流中 / 车控卡下）——UIUE lens3/7/8 + car-hmi NOMI 三屏天然同构 + iPhone 759pt 可用高的合理分配（local F5）。保留。
35	- ✅ **深空辉光卡片语言**（cyan/violet glow breathe）——保留，但**只激活态 breathe**（local F8 + pitfalls T1：10 张同屏 breathe = 10 offscreen pass，省 9/10 动画）。
36	- ✅ **base #0a0b12 非纯黑 + glow 30-60% 不铺满**（U11 + pitfalls T4 halation + local F3 投屏 banding，三路同源）。
37	
38	**必须为 10 族重构（信息架构层，scheme1 撑不住）**：
39	- 🔴 **4-6 卡 2×2 固定网格 → 10 族 family_card 自适应网格**（U13）。scheme1 `grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr` 固定 2 列撑不住 10 族；ContentView.swift:40 现喂 22 个 device 平铺 = **信息架构粒度错（device 级非族级）**，不是布局技术缺（5 路共识）。
40	- 🔴 **7 态压绿/灰二值 → 7 态色 1:1 映射**。ContentView.swift:122,126 现 `visualState==.satisfied ? .green : .gray`（主线程实读坐实）= tokens.md:64 + U10 头号翻车点。clarify(琥珀)/unsupported(灰锁)/unsafe(红)/crash(中性灰) 四态必分开（demo 卖点）。
41	- 🔴 **族卡只显当前态摘要，细控件进聚焦展开态**（car-hmi MBUX「常驻少数 + 细控展开」+ Apple Home 分组卡 + Mi Home 三尺寸）。族卡空间放不下完整 slider+color picker（local F10）。
42	- 🔴 **字号按 1080p @1x 投屏放大**：scheme1 `font.card.val 15px` 远低于投屏下限（local F4 body ≥24pt / 标题 ≥44pt 8H 规则）。
43	
44	---
45	
46	## 4. 决策 + ⭐默认（见 decisions 字段，逐条带量化 + 证据）
47	
48	---
49	
50	## 5. pre-mortem 三分类汇总（7 路去重，见 pre_mortem_summary）
51	
52	---
53	
54	## 6. grill 弹药（见 grill_ammo 字段，喂回主线程 grill 磊哥）
55	
56	---
57	
58	## 7. adopt 清单（见 adopt_list 字段，star>1000 不降级，带 file:line/star/日期）
59	
60	---
61	
62	## 8. 结论一句话
63	
64	scheme1 的视觉语言（深空辉光三屏）三路认证保留，但**信息架构必须从「4 卡 2×2 平铺 device」重构为「10 族 family_card 全景常驻网格 + 语音触发聚焦展开 + 7 态色 1:1 + value.type 异构控件」**。主形态 = **A+B 合体（全景常驻 + 触发聚焦）**，5 路独立收敛；唯一待磊哥拍的事实型分歧 = 聚焦过渡是否用 matchedGeometryEffect（macOS 无 zoom 退路 + LazyVGrid 冲突 = 倾向禁用、改 opacity/scale）。

Here's what I found about SwiftUI's `MeshGradient` availability:

## Platform Availability

According to Apple's official documentation, `MeshGradient` is a two-dimensional gradient defined by a 2D grid of positioned colors, available on iOS 18.0+, iPadOS 18.0+, Mac Catalyst 18.0+, macOS 15.0+, tvOS 18.0+, visionOS 2.0+, and watchOS 11.0+.

To confirm the full list, MeshGradient is available on iOS 18, iPadOS 18, macOS 15, tvOS 18, watchOS 11, visionOS 2, and newer.

This feature also requires iOS 18 and Xcode 16.

## What MeshGradient Is

A mesh gradient is a structure where each vertex has a position, a color and four surrounding Bezier control points (leading, top, trailing, bottom) that define the tangents connecting the vertex with its four neighboring vertices. Vertices on the corners or edges of the mesh have less than four neighbors, so they ignore their extra control points.

It's described as the most sophisticated type of gradient available in SwiftUI, offering beautiful and complex color transitions rendered with impressive speed.

## Basic Usage

The simplest way to create one is to specify the width, height, points, and colors. For example:

```swift
MeshGradient(width: 2, height: 2, points: [
    [0, 0], [1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 1]
], colors: [.red, .green, .blue, .yellow])
```

That points array is where SIMD2<Float> comes in – [0, 0] is the top-left corner, [1, 0] is the top-right corner, and so on.

## Guarding Availability in Code

Since it's only available on the newer OS versions, you'll typically guard it with an availability check. Common annotations used in practice include `@available(iOS 18.0, macOS 15.0, tvOS 18.0, watchOS 11.0, visionOS 2.0, *)`, and runtime checks via `if #available(...)` with a fallback such as a `LinearGradient` for earlier OS versions.

The `MeshGradient` struct also offers advanced options including smoothsColors (determines whether cubic, smooth interpolation should be used for colors in the mesh), colorSpace (specifies the color space in which to interpolate vertex colors), and bezierPoints (allows explicit specification of Bezier control points for more complex gradients).

It's worth noting that MeshGradient works as both a View and a ShapeStyle, which means you can put it directly in a ZStack, or use it to fill a shape.

NavigationTransition | by ganeshrajugalla | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@ganeshrajugalla/swiftui-navigationtransition-e44b1032cf0e"},{"title":"SwiftUI | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/topics/ui-frameworks-topic/ui-frameworks-topic-swiftui?page=4&sortBy=newest"},{"title":"matchedTransitionSource(id:in:) | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftui/view/matchedtransitionsource(id:in:)"}]

Here's what I found regarding the SwiftUI zoom navigation transition availability on macOS:

## Key Finding: Zoom Transition is Unavailable on macOS

The core issue is a platform availability limitation. The broader NavigationTransition protocol is available on macOS 15, but the ZoomNavigationTransition type is marked unavailable on macOS in the current SDK, so keep this code in an iOS or iPadOS availability boundary.

## Platform Availability Details

The zoom transition API has a specific set of supported platforms that excludes macOS. The ZoomNavigationTransition API is available starting in iOS 18, iPadOS 18, tvOS 18, watchOS 11, and visionOS 2.

## The Workaround: Availability Boundaries

The recommended approach is to wrap the zoom transition code in platform/version checks so it gracefully falls back on macOS and older OS versions. From the example implementation, the source modifier uses an `#if os(iOS)` guard combined with `if #available(iOS 18.0, *)`:

- The `zoomTransitionSource` helper applies `matchedTransitionSource(id:in:)` only when running on iOS 18+, returning `self` (unmodified) otherwise.
- The `zoomTransitionDestination` helper applies `navigationTransition(.zoom(sourceID:in:))` only on iOS 18+, returning `self` otherwise.

This pattern ensures the code compiles and runs on macOS without triggering the unavailable `ZoomNavigationTransition` type, simply falling back to ordinary navigation.

## How the Two Modifiers Work Together

For the transition to function on supported platforms, both modifiers must be present and agree on an identifier:

- Use the matchedTransitionSource() modifier on whatever source view is triggering the transition. Use the navigationTransition() modifier on whatever destination view you're navigating to. Both modifiers must be given a stable view ID that is being transitioned, just like matched geometry effects.

- The source modifier identifies the view SwiftUI should zoom from. The destination modifier chooses the zoom transition and points at the same id and namespace. If either one is missing, or the IDs do not match, SwiftUI cannot connect the two views, so you should expect ordinary navigation instead of the connected zoom effect.

The `matchedTransitionSource(id:in:)` modifier itself is the official Apple API that identifies this view as the source of a navigation transition, such as a zoom transition.

## Best Practice for Identifiers

When implementing this, it's important to use stable identifiers rather than positional ones. Use a stable model ID, not an array index. Indexes change when the grid is filtered, sorted, reloaded, or paged, and those are exactly the moments where you want navigation to remain calm.

## Summary

If you're getting an "unavailable" error for `ZoomNavigationTransition` / `.zoom` on macOS, this is expected behavior — the zoom transition type is simply not supported on macOS even though the general `NavigationTransition` protocol exists there. Wrap your `matchedTransitionSource` and `navigationTransition(.zoom(...))` calls in `#if os(iOS)` (plus `#available` checks for iOS 17 fallback) so your code falls back to standard navigation on macOS.

Links: [{"title":"Detecting low power mode","url":"https://useyourloaf.com/blog/detecting-low-power-mode/"},{"title":"isLowPowerModeEnabled | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/processinfo/islowpowermodeenabled"},{"title":"How to detect low power mode is enabled - free Swift example code and tips","url":"https://www.hackingwithswift.com/example-code/system/how-to-detect-low-power-mode-is-enabled"},{"title":"Monkeybread Xojo plugin - NSProcessInfoMBS properties","url":"https://www.monkeybreadsoftware.net/process-nsprocessinfombs-property.shtml"},{"title":"Detect and make your iPhone app responds to low-power mode · GitHub","url":"https://gist.github.com/juliengdt/cfad1bbb619bcad6bfc9ecb28fb5149f"},{"title":"Energy Efficiency Guide for iOS Apps: React to Low Power Mode on iPhones","url":"https://developer.apple.com/library/prerelease/ios/documentation/Performance/Conceptual/EnergyGuide-iOS/LowPowerMode.html"}]

Here's what I found regarding `ProcessInfo.isLowPowerModeEnabled` and its behavior across Apple platforms:

## Summary

**Low Power Mode is an iPhone-only feature.** Low power mode is an iPhone only feature. Testing for it on an iPad will always return false. This is confirmed by multiple sources — LPM is an iPhone-only feature. If you call it on an iPad, it will return you always false.

## Background

With iOS 9 Apple added a Low Power Mode to the iPhone. It extends battery life by stopping some battery heavy features such as email fetch, Hey Siri and background app refresh until you can recharge the device. It is important to understand that it is the user who decides to enter low power mode. You need to go into the battery settings to turn it on. When you do the battery in the status bar turns yellow: It turns off automatically once you charge the device to 80%.

## How to detect it

You can check the current state by reading the `isLowPowerModeEnabled` property. A Boolean value that indicates the current state of Low Power Mode.

In Swift:
```swift
if ProcessInfo.processInfo.isLowPowerModeEnabled {
    // stop battery intensive actions
}
```

## Responding to changes

To react when the user toggles the mode, you register for a notification. Your app can query the current power state at any time by accessing the isLowPowerModeEnabled property of the NSProcessInfo class. This property contains a boolean value, indicating whether Low Power Mode is enabled or disabled.

You can register using `Notification.Name.NSProcessInfoPowerStateDidChange`. Once your app is notified of a power state change, it should then query isLowPowerModeEnabled to determine the current power state. If Low Power Mode is active, then your app can take appropriate steps to reduce activity. Otherwise, it can resume normal operations.

## Key takeaway

Since Low Power Mode is an iPhone-only feature, calling `isLowPowerModeEnabled` on an **iPad** (or Mac) will always return `false`. Detecting that the user has turned low power mode on is only useful if your app is able to take some energy-saving measures to prolong battery life. If your app targets iPad or Mac and relies on this for battery optimization, you'll need an alternative strategy since the value won't reflect any real low-power state on those platforms.

Links: [{"title":"iOS 15 - AVSpeechSynthesizerDelegate didCancel ...","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/691347"},{"title":"Speech | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/tags/speech/?sortBy=oldest"},{"title":"AVSpeechSynthesizer Broken on iOS … | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/737685"},{"title":"speechSynthesizer(_:didCancel:) | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/avfaudio/avspeechsynthesizerdelegate/1619678-speechsynthesizer"},{"title":"AVSpeechSynthesizer works wrong wi… | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/692192"}]

Here's what I found about the AVSpeechSynthesizer issue where `didCancel` isn't called when stopping speech:

## The Core Bug

Starting in iOS 15, there's a well-documented bug where on stopSpeaking of AVSpeechSynthesizer, didFinish delegate method gets called instead of didCancel, which is working fine in iOS 14 and below versions. This is the central problem affecting barge-in implementations where you need to reliably detect cancellation.

### Reproducing the Issue

A developer posted a minimal reproduction confirming the behavior across iOS versions. When run on iOS 15.5, it prints "from inside didFinish speaking", but when run on iOS 14.3, it prints "from inside didCancel", which is the correct behavior according to Apple's documentation.

The reproduction calls `stopSpeaking(at: .immediate)` after a delay, but instead of triggering the cancel delegate, it incorrectly fires the finish delegate.

### Expected Behavior (Per Apple Docs)

According to Apple's documentation, the speechSynthesizer(_:didCancel:) method tells the delegate when the synthesizer cancels speaking an utterance. This is what *should* fire after `stopSpeaking`, but the bug routes the callback to `didFinish` instead.

## Related Issues

There are also related problems that can confuse barge-in/boundary handling:

1. **Spurious cancellation on iOS 17** — utterances stop partway through speaking. When using AVSpeechUtterance with certain strings, it stops abruptly after speaking only part of the string. For example, given a string of about 500 words, it speaks around 15 words and then stops, and when this happens, the synthesizer delegate method -speechSynthesizer:didCancel Utterance: is called.

2. **Premature finish on long strings** — Another developer reported that feeding certain strings to AVSpeechUtterance, it just stops after only speaking a portion of the string. For example, a string of approximately 1200 words speaks up to around 300 words and then stops, and the delegate method -speechSynthesizer:didFinishSpeechUtterance: is called when this happens, as if this is supposed to be the end even though it is not even close to being finished.

## Partial Fix in iOS 16

Some related AVSpeechSynthesizer breakage was addressed in a later release. One developer noted the problem seems to be fixed in iOS 16 Beta.

## Practical Implications for Barge-In

For your barge-in scenario (interrupting active speech when a user starts speaking), the key takeaway is that **you cannot rely solely on `didCancel` to detect that `stopSpeaking(at: .immediate)` succeeded** on iOS 15+. Practical workarounds developers use include:

- Tracking your own "stop requested" flag before calling `stopSpeaking`, then checking it inside *both* the `didFinish` and `didCancel` delegate methods to determine which path actually occurred.
- Using `isSpeaking` polling or the `didStart`/boundary callbacks combined with your own state machine rather than depending on the cancel callback alone.
- Not assuming `.immediate` will synchronously stop — there can be timing/audio-session latency, so guard against re-entrancy when immediately starting a new utterance after stopping.

Would you like me to search for specific workaround code patterns for reliable barge-in detection, or details on which exact iOS versions still exhibit this behavior?

Links: [{"title":"SwiftUI Grid, LazyVGrid, LazyHGrid Explained with Code Examples","url":"https://www.avanderlee.com/swiftui/grid-lazyvgrid-lazyhgrid-gridviews/"},{"title":"Various Kinds of Grid Views in SwiftUI: A Comprehensive Guide | by Jakir Hossain | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@jakir/various-kind-of-grid-views-in-swiftui-a-comprehensive-guide-5650511937a0"},{"title":"SwiftUI Grid Views (LazyHGrid and LazyVGrid) - CodeWithChris : CodeWithChris","url":"https://codewithchris.com/swiftui-grid-views/"},{"title":"LazyVGrid | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftui/lazyvgrid"},{"title":"How to position views in a grid using LazyVGrid and LazyHGrid - a free SwiftUI by Example tutorial","url":"https://www.hackingwithswift.com/quick-start/swiftui/how-to-position-views-in-a-grid-using-lazyvgrid-and-lazyhgrid"},{"title":"GitHub - pietropizzi/GridStack: A flexible grid layout view for SwiftUI","url":"https://github.com/pietropizzi/GridStack"},{"title":"Exploring the SwiftUI’s Grid View: LazyVGrid & GridItem and Grid & GridRow","url":"https://rohit-13.medium.com/exploring-the-swiftuis-grid-view-lazyvgrid-griditem-and-grid-gridrow-888fca958b0f"},{"title":"Impossible Grids with SwiftUI - The SwiftUI Lab","url":"https://swiftui-lab.com/impossible-grids/"},{"title":"SwiftUI Grid Tutorial","url":"https://swiftprogramming.com/swiftui-grid/"},{"title":"LazyHGrid | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftui/lazyhgrid"}]

Here's a summary of what I found on SwiftUI's `Grid` view availability versus the lazy grids:

## Availability

**`Grid` and `GridRow`** were introduced more recently. In iOS 16, Apple introduced the Grid view in SwiftUI. You might initially think that it's unnecessary or redundant since we already have a Lazy Grid. The corresponding desktop release is macOS 13, and these were added in Xcode 14.

**`LazyVGrid` and `LazyHGrid`** are older. According to Apple's documentation, LazyHGrid is available on iOS 14.0+, iPadOS 14.0+, Mac Catalyst 14.0+, macOS 11.0+, tvOS 14.0+, visionOS 1.0+, and watchOS 7.0+. Apple released LazyVGrid and LazyHGrid at WWDC20. If you are fine to only support iPadOS 14, macOS 11, tvOS 14, and watchOS 7, those are the way to go.

## Rendering: Lazy vs. Eager

The key behavioral difference is how and when child views are created:

**Lazy grids** render on demand. The "Lazy" prefix in LazyVGrid and LazyHGrid indicates that the views contained in the grid are only rendered when on screen. When they are off-screen, they are not part of the view hierarchy. As the user scrolls, new views are created on demand, and old views that move out of the screen are discarded. This reduces memory usage and ensures smooth scrolling performance, especially in scenarios where many items need to be displayed.

**The `Grid` view** renders everything immediately. Per Apple's docs, unlike a lazy grid, which creates child views only when SwiftUI needs to display them, a regular grid creates all of its child views right away. This enables the grid to provide better support for cell spacing and alignment.

## Which to Use

Apple's guidance is to prefer `Grid` by default and only switch to lazy grids when needed for performance: Only use a lazy grid if profiling your app shows that a Grid view performs poorly because it tries to load too many views at once. This is echoed in practice: a lazy grid only creates views when they're about to appear on screen—a standard Grid generates all of its cells immediately. It's best to stick with Grid unless performance testing shows it struggles due to rendering too many views at once—then switching to a lazy grid might help.

A practical breakdown of use cases:
- **Lazy grids** — They are ideal for large data collections (photo galleries, product feeds). Note that a LazyVGrid does not have its own scrolling. Therefore, it must almost always be wrapped in a ScrollView.
- **`Grid`** — It is ideal for fixed structure designs, such as a calendar, a calculator, or a settings form. Because you can merge cells or columns, create blank cells, set cell spacing, control alignment, and other things, it works well for table-like, two-dimensional layouts where you need precise alignment across rows and columns.

**Bottom line:** If you need to support iOS 14/macOS 11 through iOS 15, the lazy grids are your only built-in grid option. If you can target iOS 16/macOS 13 and up, you have a choice — use `Grid` for static, well-aligned layouts, and reserve `LazyVGrid`/`LazyHGrid` for large, scrollable datasets where lazy rendering meaningfully helps performance.

Links: [{"title":"Request and check local network permission on iOS and visionOS | Nonstrict","url":"https://nonstrict.eu/blog/2024/request-and-check-for-local-network-permission/"},{"title":"Bonjour | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/tags/bonjour"},{"title":"Function to request and check Local Network permission on iOS, iPadOS & visionOS · GitHub","url":"https://gist.github.com/mac-cain13/fa684f54a7ae1bba8669e78d28611784"},{"title":"TN3179: Understanding local network privacy | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/technotes/tn3179-understanding-local-network-privacy"},{"title":"iOS local network privacy permission explained | PTKD Journal","url":"https://ptkd.com/journal/ios-local-network-privacy-permission"},{"title":"Privacy | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/tags/privacy"},{"title":"iOS 18 local network permission is… | Apple Developer Forums","url":"https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/766133"},{"title":"Support local network privacy in your app - WWDC20 - Videos - Apple Developer","url":"https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2020/10110/"},{"title":"How to use multicast networking in your app - Discover - Apple Developer","url":"https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=0oi77447"}]

Here's a summary of what I found on iOS Local Network privacy permission and how Bonjour/`NWBrowser`/`NWListener` relate to triggering the required prompt.

## What the permission is

Since iOS 14, local network access is gated behind a user consent prompt. An app that discovers or connects to devices on the user's local network, through Bonjour or mDNS discovery, network scanning, or direct local connections, must request the local network permission, declared with an NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription purpose string, and the system shows the user a prompt. Apple added this in iOS 14 because local network access can enumerate the devices on a user's home or office network, smart-home gadgets, computers, other phones, which is sensitive information about the user's environment. So the prompt is a privacy control: the user decides whether your app may see and reach their local devices.

## Required Info.plist entries

Two declarations are needed. If your app ever accesses the local network, you should provide a usage description. This explains which features in your app require the local network. And second, if your app uses Bonjour to browse or advertise, you must provide a list of the service types that you use. Each service type is a unique string registered with IANA, that identifies your application protocol.

If you miss these, you'll get an error. There is an error that we're getting from our browser object of "NoAuth." This error means that the app is being blocked without any local network access prompt. If you see this NoAuth error, it means that you need to add your Bonjour services and usage description to your Info.plist.

## No dedicated API — using NWBrowser/NWListener to trigger the prompt

There's no public API to directly request or check this permission. From our understanding, there is no dedicated public API to explicitly request Local Network permission or to reliably determine the current authorization state before attempting network activity. As a workaround, developers roll their own. The local network permission has, in contrast to other permissions, no simple way to request the permission or check its authorization state. We use NWBrowser to roll our own permission helper.

The common technique: Create both a NWBrowser and a NWListener that try to scan the network to find each other. This will trigger the Local Network permission request to the user when authorization isn't determined yet. For this preflight check, a dedicated Bonjour service type is registered to avoid interference — to make the NWBrowser and NWListener able to publish themselves you need to register a Bonjour service type with your app. A separate service type called _preflight_check._tcp prevents interference with any other networking features. This service must be added to the Info.plist of your app or else this whole setup won't work.

One important limitation: You can't silently check the permission without ever triggering the permission request towards the user. The request dialog does however only appear once, so after you've asked for the first time you can use this function to check if you still have permission without the user being bothered.

## Known inconsistencies (iOS 17/18 and 2025 simulator issues)

Behavior varies across OS versions and devices. The behavior is inconsistent across devices and OS versions: sometimes the popup appears immediately, sometimes it never appears, sometimes network operations silently fail without callback clarity.

A 2025 forum thread reports version-specific quirks: We found inconsistencies in iOS 17 and 18 regarding Local Network permissions. In iOS 17, denied permission blocks network calls, and even after allowing, a device restart is needed. In iOS 18, network access works even when denied, which is unexpected. We're using Bonjour to trigger the popup, as no direct API exists. There are also reported simulator problems — an advertising "denied by policy" error appeared, and going back to Xcode 16.2 still produced no prompt. So it looks like the iOS simulator on Sequoia 15.4 has an issue.

## Best-practice guidance

If your app interacts with local devices, add a clear NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription explaining why, declare the specific Bonjour service types you use in the relevant Info.plist key so discovery works, and handle the case where the user denies the permission by degrading gracefully. Notably, the "X would like to find and connect to devices on your local network" prompt surprises a lot of developers, because it can appear when they did not knowingly add local network access, often triggered by an SDK. In that case, audit your SDKs to find which one is scanning the network, and remove or reconfigure it, since you do not want to ask users for access your app does not use.

## Key references
- **Apple's official guide:** TN3179: Understanding local network privacy
- **WWDC20:** "Support local network privacy in your app"
- **Nonstrict blog + GitHub gist** by mac-cain13 — a complete Swift Concurrency implementation using `NWBrowser`/`NWListener` with a `_preflight_check._tcp` service to request and check the permission.

Would you like the actual code pattern for the preflight permission helper, or details on the multicast/`com.apple.developer.networking.multicast` entitlement path?

# contracts/l1-demo-allowlist.yaml — L1 精做炸点名单(reviewed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 归属: openspec change define-c1c2-contract / task 3.2(magnet reviewed)
# 唯一 reviewed 来源: C1 行 exec_tier=L1 只能从本表 allowlist 段展开集派生(非手写)
# 粒度: device + primitive + execution_range_cell(→C2)+ required_state_cell_groups + required_followup_transitions
# device/primitive 对齐 C1 jsonl 实际值(§28 已核); transition_id 一手绑定(§28 已核存在+语义)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 🔴 D-domain surface 映射(2026-06-23 范式翻案级联, paradigm §1-§2):
#   本表 (device, primitive) 对 = canonical IR 维度(device×action_primitive); 不是 generic frame tool_call_frame 的参数。
#   model-visible surface = D-domain 具名工具(value 形态编码进工具名): 同一 device 的不同 primitive 映射到不同具名工具,
#     例 ac_temperature.adjust_to_number → adjust_ac_temperature_to_number; ac_temperature.increase_by_exp → raise_ac_temperature_by_exp。
#   即「对模型像 D-domain 具名工具(选对工具=选对 value 形态), 对系统像 device×action IR」。
#   具名工具目录由 A2 从 C1 jsonl codegen 派生(替 scripts/gen_tool_contract.py 现硬编码 6 工具名); 工具数未拍待 value-form 实算。
#   allowlist_pending_c2 段同理: C2 cell 补齐后, 该 device primitive 集对应的 D-domain 工具进端侧炸场子集挂载白名单。
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
meta:
  review_status: reviewed
  reviewed_by: magnet
  reviewed_at: "2026-06-19"
  dianpoint_dimensions: [模糊理解, 多意图, 记忆多轮, 快FC泛化, 状态感知读回, 安全门拒识]
  batches: [纵切, 横铺]
  l1_derivation_note: >-
    gen_c1 只从 allowlist 段(纵切批)派生 exec_tier=L1 + execution_range_ref=execution_range_cell(concrete);
    allowlist_pending_c2 段(横铺批)C2 cell 未建, 不派生 L1, 待 C2 补 cell 后移入 allowlist。

# ============================================================================
# 纵切批(C2 state-cells 已就绪 → L1 派生 + execution_range_ref 闭合)
# ============================================================================
allowlist:

  - device: ac_temperature              # C1 jsonl device(44 行, §28 已核)
    display_zh: 空调温度
    batch: 纵切
    dimensions: [模糊理解, 多意图, 记忆多轮, 状态感知读回]
    primitives:                          # 对齐 device=ac_temperature 实际 action_primitive
      - increase_by_exp                  # "调高一点"=经验值(EXP)← 模糊
      - decrease_by_exp                  # "调低一点"
      - adjust_to_number                 # "调到24度"=绝对(SPOT)
      - adjust_to_gear                   # "调到高挡"=经验档
      - adjust_to_max                    # "调到最高"
=== capabilities head ===
# ⚠️ HISTORICAL / v1-B-frame-archived（2026-06-23 文档级联，范式翻案）
# 现行权威 = contracts/semantic-function-contract.jsonl（C1 SSOT，3990 源行级全集）
#   + docs/c5-recovery-2026-06-22/grill-decisions-amend-paradigm-tool-surface.md（surface 范式权威）。
# 本文件的 8 个能力（cabin.ac 等）+ tool_schema 名（set_cabin_ac / set_cabin_window 等）= 旧 B-frame 式手写示范，
#   不是 model-visible surface 的最终形态。范式翻案后：
#   - model-visible surface = D-domain 具名工具（value 形态编码进工具名，如 adjust_ac_temperature_to_max / _to_number / _by_exp / query_ac_temperature）；
#     generic frame（tool_call_frame）作 surface 已否决（paradigm §1-§2）。
#   - canonical IR 仍 device × action_primitive × value（B-frame 式），即「对模型像 D-domain 具名工具，对系统像 device×action IR」。
#   - D-domain 具名工具目录由 A2 从 semantic-function-contract.jsonl codegen 派生（替 scripts/gen_tool_contract.py 现硬编码 6 工具名）；
#     工具数未拍待 value-form 实算（10 族 = 191 device / 562 intent / 2159 行 / 54.1%，但 562=intent 非工具数；
#       source: docs/research/2026-06-22-mvp-10family-device-boundary.md:39（2159/3990=54.1%）+ paradigm §14:228-231；562 = 磊哥 2026-06-23 终拍权威，534 系列已废）。
# 保留本文件作旧 surface 示范 / eval refs / voice aliases 溯源，勿当权威 surface 派生源。升级目标见 paradigm §15-§17。
version: 1
state: active
source_of_truth: contracts/capabilities.yaml
notes:
  - "MAformac Phase1 MVP vehicle capability contract."
  - "This file is the single manually maintained source for tool schemas, UI cards, eval refs, trace schema, voice aliases, and LoRA labels."
  - "Generated Swift types and tool_schemas.json are owned by later changes."
  - "⚠️ HISTORICAL v1-B-frame: tool_schema 名为旧 B-frame 示范；model-visible surface 已翻案为 D-domain 具名工具（见文件头 banner + paradigm §1-§2）。"

    status: superseded
    path: docs/repo-intelligence/2026-06-17-gitnexus/03-openspec-input.md

    status: superseded

=== demo-scenarios ===
# contracts/demo-scenarios.yaml — demo 5 幕「泛化 showcase 规格」（非规则脚本）
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 归属: openspec change define-c1c2-contract / task 4.2（magnet reviewed）
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ⚠️ 本文件不是固定话术脚本。每幕定【意图类 + 期望行为】, 配若干【话术变体】。
#    变体不用于规则匹配, 用途有二:
#      ① 表达泛化目标 ——「多一个字少一个字」皆应命中同一意图（现场话术即兴）。
#      ② 当 C5 LoRA 训练 / C6 评测的种子（非穷举, 示范覆盖面）。
#    demo 的惊艳来自 LoRA 泛化（20% 模糊/跨域/记忆/状态感知）, 不来自规则匹配。
#    规则只兜 80% 高频明确指令（见 CLAUDE.md §4「规则 vs 模型」）。
#    —— 若把本 demo 做成规则查表, 现场换个说法即崩, 毫无意义（magnet 2026-06-19 定）。
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 🔴 D-domain surface + clarifyTag（2026-06-23 范式翻案级联, paradigm §1-§2）:
#   - 各幕 beats[].c1_ref 是 canonical IR（device × primitive），是工具调用的【系统侧】表示。
#   - model-visible surface = D-domain 具名工具（value 形态编码进工具名）: 每幕「期望 ToolCall」在 C6/runtime
#     最终映射到 D-domain 具名工具名（如 scene2 open_ac+adjust_to_number → open_ac / adjust_ac_temperature_to_number）。
#     ⚠️ expected_tool_calls 的 D-domain 工具名重写 = A2 codegen 任务（从 C1 jsonl 派生 tool 名后回填 C6 bench cases），
#        本文件保持 c1_ref(device×primitive IR) 不变, 不在此手写工具名（防第二套手写 SSOT）。
#   - clarifyTag 路由: c1_ref.clarify_tag=explicit 走规则快路(L1, 不调模型); implicit/ambiguous 走慢路(Qwen+LoRA)。
#     D-domain surface 只在慢路（模型吐具名工具）出现; L1 快路直接 device×action 下发, 不经模型 surface。
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
meta:
  review_status: reviewed
  reviewed_by: magnet
  reviewed_at: "2026-06-19"
  narrative: 混合框架（轻量「现场体验座舱助手」背景 + 每幕独立可跳 + 维度易→难递进 + 安全门 climax）
  driven_by: lora_generalization            # 非 rule_matching
  feeds: [c5_lora_train_seed, c6_demo_must_pass_eval]
  # ⚠️ 状态: C6 seed / interim — 非已闭合 contract(跨厂商审计 2026-06-20 防"reviewed 候选伪装闭合")。
  #    待 C4/C6 apply 补: ① routing-aware(每幕标 快规则/慢Qwen 路径 + clarifyTag)
  #    ② C6 字段 schema(input_zh / expected_tool_calls / expected_state_delta / expect_no_call / failure_class)
  #    ③ scenario_required cell 回填 state-cells。现仅作 LoRA/C6 种子 + 引用绑定验证(verify_demo_scenarios 最小门)。
  status: c6_seed_interim
  variants_note: utterance_variants 为泛化示例 + LoRA 种子, 非匹配白名单; 现场话术即兴, 模型泛化
  # demo 初始 mock 端态（每幕可在 initial_state 覆盖）
  initial_state_default:
    ac.power: off
    ac.temp_setpoint: known
    window.position: 0
    window.motion: stopped
    ambient.color: off
    vehicle.speed: 0
    vehicle.gear: P
  # 端态/读回引用 C2 state-cells.yaml（唯一 execution_range/readback 权威, 本文件不重复定义数值）
  state_source: contracts/state-cells.yaml
  c1_intent_source: contracts/semantic-function-contract.jsonl

I'll search for information about AVSpeechSynthesizer offline Chinese voice quality and related topics.

Links: [{"title":"Using your Personal Voice (along with system and novelty voices) in an iOS app","url":"https://bendodson.com/weblog/2024/04/03/using-your-personal-voice-in-an-ios-app/"},{"title":"AVSpeechSynthesizer Tutorial - Letting Your App Speak Like Siri","url":"https://www.devfright.com/quick-look-avspeechsynthesizer-class/"},{"title":"What is Siri TTS? How to Use it and When You’ll Need More - Voice.ai","url":"https://voice.ai/hub/tts/siri-tts/"},{"title":"How to Use Your Personal Voice with AVSpeechSynthesizer - DevFright","url":"https://www.devfright.com/how-to-use-your-personal-voice-with-avspeechsynthesizer/"},{"title":"AVSpeechSynthesizer - NSHipster","url":"https://nshipster.com/avspeechsynthesizer/"},{"title":"Local text-to-speech AI on Mac, 2026: three honest paths and the one Fazm did not take","url":"https://fazm.ai/t/local-text-to-speech-ai"},{"title":"Siri-Speech - HackMD","url":"https://hackmd.io/@rizzyD/r1Wjq4RU9"}]

Here's what I found about AVSpeechSynthesizer, voice quality, and offline TTS options relevant to your query:

## Voice Quality: Robotic vs. Modern

The quality difference you may notice comes down to which voice type is used. Siri's voice quality has improved dramatically over the years. Early versions sounded robotic and stilted. Modern Siri TTS uses deep neural networks trained on vast datasets of human speech, producing a voice that sounds conversational rather than mechanical. The quality gap between early robotic versions and modern Siri TTS comes from deep neural networks trained on vast human speech datasets.

## Voice Quality Tiers in AVSpeechSynthesizer

A critical detail for avoiding robotic-sounding output is the **quality parameter**. With voices filtered by locale, the next item of interest is the quality parameter which tells us whether our voice is default, enhanced, or premium. The default voices tend to sound more robotic, while enhanced and premium voices sound much more natural. Apple's AVSpeechSynthesizer with the 'premium' and 'enhanced' voice downloads are neural and have been quietly excellent since macOS 14.

**For Chinese voices specifically**: To get less robotic quality, you'll want to ensure the user has downloaded the enhanced/premium Chinese voice via system settings, since the default pre-installed voice is typically the lower-quality one. The same neural quality improvements apply to non-English languages with downloadable enhanced/premium variants.

## Personal Voice (Offline)

For 2025-era Personal Voice support, which is fully offline: Personal Voice, available from macOS Sonoma on, records your own voice and synthesizes it offline after a one-time training pass. People with iPhone 12 or later, and various Mac and iPad devices, can spend time recording phrases on the screen, and after the device has processed those phrases, you then have a personalised voice that can be used in various places.

To access Personal Voices programmatically, you request authorization and then filter the voices array. The implementation involves creating an utterance by passing in the text, setting the rate and pitch multiplier from settings, setting the voice the utterance will use, and instructing the synthesizer to speak.

## Offline Alternatives (if AVSpeechSynthesizer quality is insufficient)

If the built-in Chinese voices still don't meet your needs, there are on-device alternatives. For workflows where the text must never touch a network—medical notes, legal memos, personal journals—any TTS that runs fully on-device qualifies: AVSpeechSynthesizer, Piper, Kokoro via MLX, and Personal Voice. Among these, Kokoro TTS, a 2025/2026 open model, has become the go-to for self-hosted pipelines because the voices sound natural and it runs on Apple Silicon through MLX or coreML converters.

A practical recommendation from one source: use Piper for low-latency general use, Kokoro when quality matters, and AVSpeechSynthesizer when you are Mac only and want zero dependencies.

## Key Takeaways for Your Use Case

1. **To avoid robotic Chinese voice**: Filter for and use **premium** or **enhanced** quality voices rather than default, and prompt users to download the higher-quality Chinese voice from system settings.
2. **Personal Voice works offline** but is generated from the user's own recordings (and is primarily English-focused for now).
3. **For top-tier offline Chinese quality**, consider Kokoro TTS running via MLX/CoreML on Apple Silicon as an alternative to the built-in synthesizer.

One important licensing note if you plan to distribute audio: the catch is licensing—Apple's Speech framework lets you trigger system speech within your app, but you cannot legally extract audio files for redistribution.

Would you like me to search for more specific details on Chinese voice identifiers, enabling premium voice downloads, or implementing Kokoro TTS on iOS/macOS?

Links: [{"title":"Gemma 4 on Mac: How to Run, Download & Set Up on macOS","url":"https://gemmai4.com/mac/"},{"title":"MLX: The Next Inference Engine for Apple Silicon","url":"https://yage.ai/share/mlx-apple-silicon-en-20260331.html"},{"title":"Local LLMs Apple Silicon Mac 2026 | M1 M2 M3 Guide","url":"https://www.sitepoint.com/local-llms-apple-silicon-mac-2026/"},{"title":"2026 M5 Apple Silicon, MLX, and Neural Accelerators: TTFT vs Decode Benchmarks and Remote Mac Offload | MACGPU Blog","url":"https://macgpu.com/en/blog/2026-0425-mac-m5-neural-accelerators-mlx-ttft-decode-benchmark-remote.html"},{"title":"GPU-Accelerated ML/DL Performance on MacBook Pro M5 Pro vs. M4 Max: Feasibility and Benchmarks for Developers. - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/valesys/gpu-accelerated-mldl-performance-on-macbook-pro-m5-pro-vs-m4-max-feasibility-and-benchmarks-for-2ka3"},{"title":"Profiling Apple Silicon Performance for ML Training","url":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2501.14925"},{"title":"MLX + EXO on Apple Silicon: 2026 Performance Benchmarks - Petronella Cybersecurity News","url":"https://petronellatech.com/blog/mlx-exo-unlocking-apple-silicon-s-ml-performance/"},{"title":"WWDC 2025 - Explore LLM on Apple silicon with MLX - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/arshtechpro/wwdc-2025-explore-llm-on-apple-silicon-with-mlx-1if7"},{"title":"Scaling On-Device GPU Inference for Large Generative Models","url":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2505.00232"}]

Here's what I found on Apple Silicon GPU contention, MLX inference, and thermal throttling under concurrent workloads:

## GPU Memory Contention from Concurrent Runtimes

A key practical takeaway is to avoid stacking multiple inference engines at once. One guide explicitly advises that you should avoid running multiple runtimes simultaneously to prevent GPU memory contention and thermal throttling. Because Apple Silicon uses a unified memory architecture, all runtimes draw from the same shared pool. Unlike traditional GPU architectures designed around independent VRAM, Apple Silicon's unified memory architecture provides a shared memory pool accessible to CPU and GPU cores, which may have advantages when managing large models—but this also means concurrent processes directly compete for the same resources.

## MLX vs. Metal Shaders (the abstraction layer matters)

MLX's design helps reduce some contention/overhead issues because it's purpose-built rather than translated. While the Metal backend of llama.cpp translates CUDA compute patterns into Metal shaders, MLX is designed from the ground up based on the hardware characteristics of Apple Silicon. By contrast, the Metal backend of llama.cpp essentially translates CUDA compute patterns into Metal shaders, incurring an abstraction loss and failing to automatically benefit from this specialized hardware.

It's worth noting how MLX engages the GPU: under the hood, it targets Apple GPUs through Metal and Metal Performance Shaders (MPS), while also supporting CPU execution. MLX focuses on GPU acceleration via Metal/MPS while taking advantage of unified memory across CPU and GPU. Even on the newest hardware, Metal Performance Shaders and the MLX runtime still cooperate through the same command encoders.

## Shader Compilation Latency (a first-run "cold start" cost)

A contention-adjacent effect worth planning around: the first inference run on a new model triggers Metal shader compilation, which can add several seconds of latency. Subsequent runs benefit from macOS's persistent shader cache. There is no manual pre-warming step required.

## Thermal Throttling Behavior

On the thermal front, the architecture is reported to handle sustained loads reasonably well for single-stream work. The efficiency/performance core split helps, where Apple's efficiency cores manage background tokenization and pre-processing while performance cores handle parallel decoding. This architecture sustains consistent inference speeds without aggressive thermal throttling, even during extended multi-turn sessions.

However, thermals remain a hard constraint specifically on laptops and high-end configs. One M5 benchmark analysis notes that CapEx for Ultra-class unified memory solves peak VRAM but not thermals on laptops or travel disconnects.

## Prefill vs. Decode — Where Contention Actually Hits

Understanding the two-phase nature of inference helps explain where GPU/memory pressure concentrates. The recommendation is to treat inference as prefill GEMM-heavy work followed by bandwidth-heavy decode loops. Neural Accelerators on M5 target large matrix multiplies in the first phase; decode still walks KV caches and weights through unified memory. This matters because Apple Silicon research shows TTFT improvements can dominate headlines while decode gains stay modest and quantisation dependent. In a concurrent setting, the bandwidth-heavy decode phase competing for shared unified memory is often the real bottleneck rather than raw compute.

## Practical Recommendations Synthesized from Sources

- **Run one inference engine at a time** to avoid the documented memory contention + thermal throttling combination.
- **Prefer MLX over Metal-translated backends** on Apple Silicon for better native hardware utilization, especially for long-output workloads.
- **Account for first-run shader compilation latency** rather than treating it as a regression.
- **Watch thermals on laptops/Ultra travel setups**, where unified memory capacity doesn't solve the thermal envelope.
- **Match your chip choice to your workload phase** — TTFT-heavy (long prompts) vs. decode-heavy (long generation), since if your workload is short prompts with long completions, weight decode percentiles. If your workload stacks 16k-token system prompts, weight TTFT and peak resident memory before you argue about chip SKU.

Note that some sources contain conflicting or unusual benchmark claims (e.g., one source's claim that the M4 Max outperforms the "M5 Pro" should be treated cautiously, as it doesn't align well with Apple's generational chip progression). Would you like me to dig deeper into any specific aspect—such as concrete concurrent-load benchmarks or MLX memory management/cleanup patterns?

This is really just a document I can point Claude at when I want to make glass. conor.fyi/writing/liquid-glass-reference · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/conorluddy/LiquidGlassReference"},{"title":"Applying Liquid Glass to custom views | Apple Developer Documentation","url":"https://developer.apple.com/documentation/SwiftUI/Applying-Liquid-Glass-to-custom-views"},{"title":"Apple Liquid Glass in iOS 26: Complete SwiftUI Implementation Guide | Skyscraper","url":"https://getskyscraper.com/blog/apple-liquid-glass-ios-26-swiftui-guide"},{"title":"glassEffect SwiftUI Modifier - iOS Compatibility | iOS compatibility","url":"https://ioscompatibility.com/modifiers/glass-effect"},{"title":"iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI Guide: SwiftUI glassEffect API, Architecture & Best Practices | Medium","url":"https://vikramios.medium.com/the-liquid-glass-ui-revolution-everything-ios-developers-need-to-know-right-now-e29144a5e88a"},{"title":"GitHub - GonzaloFuentes28/LiquidGlassCheatsheet: CheatSheet on how to implement Liquid Glass on iOS 26 with SwiftUI · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/GonzaloFuentes28/LiquidGlassCheatsheet"},{"title":"GitHub - mertozseven/LiquidGlassSwiftUI: Sample app demonstrating iOS 26 Liquid Glass in SwiftUI with a quote card, expandable action buttons, and smooth symbol transitions. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/mertozseven/LiquidGlassSwiftUI"},{"title":"Liquid Glass in Swift: Official Best Practices for iOS 26 & macOS Tahoe - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/diskcleankit/liquid-glass-in-swift-official-best-practices-for-ios-26-macos-tahoe-1coo"},{"title":"SwiftUI Liquid Glass: The Complete iOS 26 Guide","url":"https://www.atelier-socle.com/en/articles/swiftui-liquid-glass-guide"}]

Here's what I found about the SwiftUI `glassEffect` availability and the Liquid Glass design system:

## Availability

The `.glassEffect()` modifier requires iOS 26 or later. This means 64.7% of current iOS users can use this modifier. It's also available on iOS 26+, iPadOS 26+, macOS Tahoe+, tvOS 26+, and watchOS 26+.

## When It Was Introduced

Liquid Glass was unveiled at WWDC 2025. Apple's most significant design overhaul since iOS 7 dropped at WWDC 2025, introducing Liquid Glass with SwiftUI's .glassEffect() API. Apple covered it across multiple sessions, including WWDC 2025 Session 219: Meet Liquid Glass, WWDC 2025 Session 323: Build a SwiftUI app with the new design, and WWDC 2025 Session 310: Build an AppKit app with the new design.

## What It Is

Liquid Glass is a new dynamic material that combines the optical properties of glass with a sense of fluidity. It blurs content behind it, reflects color and light of surrounding content, and reacts to touch and pointer interactions in real time.

## Basic Usage

By default, the modifier uses the regular variant of Glass and applies the given effect within a Capsule shape behind the view's content. The API signature is:

```swift
func glassEffect<S: Shape>(
    _ glass: Glass = .regular,
    in shape: S = DefaultGlassEffectShape,
    isEnabled: Bool = true
) -> some View
```

The `Glass` struct provides static variants regular, clear, and identity, along with functions to tint a color and make it interactive.

## Backward Compatibility

If your app supports older iOS versions, you can conditionally apply the modifier. If your app supports iOS versions older than 26, you can use #available to conditionally apply this modifier: if #available(iOS 26, *) { myView.glassEffect() } else { a fallback for older iOS versions }. Importantly, if you target earlier iOS versions or older Xcode releases, the Glass-related APIs will not compile.

## Official Documentation

The official Apple reference is the page "Applying Liquid Glass to custom views," which notes that standard components in SwiftUI use Liquid Glass, and you can adopt Liquid Glass on custom components to move, combine, and morph them into one another with unique animations and transitions.

For multiple glass elements, Apple recommends using `GlassEffectContainer`, since a container should be used when applying Liquid Glass effects on multiple views to achieve the best rendering performance, and it also allows views with Liquid Glass effects to blend their shapes together and to morph in and out of each other during transitions.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

This is a finding worth surfacing.

## 评审说明（盲评 · 风险视角 · Round 1）

我把这 30 个候选**当作从零提案**审。先做了本地核（ContentView/state store/state-cells/tokens/hig-rules/scheme1 原型 + 7 个 lens 调研档），再联网核了所有 load-bearing 的 SwiftUI API 版本 / iOS 行为坑。**重要前置事实**：当前 `App/ContentView.swift` 是个 22 个扁平 device key 的 `LazyVGrid` 绿/灰二值骨架（不是深空辉光、不是 10 族、不是聚焦），所以这 30 个候选**全是面向未来的提案**，对比基线 = 一个原始 demo 骨架。这意味着「Verifiability」要分两层：① 提案引用的技术事实可否证（高）② 提案声称的 UI 是否已存在（否，全是 to-build）。

---

## 30 候选评分表（C1-C30 × 5 维 + Total，每维 1-5）

| ID | Importance | Verifiability | Non-dup | Leverage | RiskReveal | **Total** | verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

| C4 双屏=两独立端侧实例 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | **20** | keep |
| C5 主视图=全景常驻+聚焦 | 5 | 5 | 3 | 4 | 4 | **21** | keep |
| C6 展开=语音主tap辅同入口 | 4 | 4 | 3 | 4 | 3 | **18** | keep |
| C7 原地放大+blur非modal | 4 | 4 | 3 | 3 | 3 | **17** | keep |
| C8 子device显3-4高频 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | **20** | keep |

| C21 过渡=matchedGeometry非zoom | 5 | 5 | 4 | 4 | 5 | **23** | keep |
